# Marketing Import Assets

This folder contains launch-ready CSV assets for GoFieldwise campaigns.

## Files
- google_ads_keywords.csv: Google Ads keyword starter list by industry
- google_ads_rsa_ads.csv: Google Ads responsive search ad copy by industry
- facebook_instagram_ads.csv: Meta ad copy starter rows by industry
- email_sequence_templates.csv: 3-email onboarding and conversion sequence
- utm_landing_urls.csv: UTM-tagged links for Google and Meta campaigns

## Quick Start
1. Import google_ads_keywords.csv and google_ads_rsa_ads.csv into Google Ads Editor.
2. Build Meta ads using facebook_instagram_ads.csv copy and map each row to a creative.
3. Import email_sequence_templates.csv into your ESP as templates or a drip campaign.
4. Use utm_landing_urls.csv for every paid placement.

## Notes
- Replace placeholders like {{first_name}}, {{industry}}, {{demo_link}}, {{calendar_link}}, and {{case_study_link}} before sending emails.
- Keep naming conventions consistent so reporting is clean.
- Use the matching industry URL in each ad group and ad set.
